user_query: I'm interested in the performance data of major global indices. Can you fetch the performance data of major global indices, including the daily, one-week, one-month, year-to-date, one-year, and three-year performance? Additionally, I would like to read the latest financial news articles.

TaskList.description: Fetch the performance data of major global indices, including daily, one-week, one-month, year-to-date, one-year, and three-year performance.
Retrieve the latest financial news articles.
